case_title: MANDY BLAKE ET AL VS. DOORDASH, INC.
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-24-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, JUL-24-2023. HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS MANDY BLAKE, GRISELDA BLANCO, JASMIN BLEDSAW, DALE BLOCK, AND MAX BOBRITSKY'S MOTION FOR STAY. MATTER IS DISCUSSED. COUNSEL CONFIRMS IN OPEN COURT THAT THE MOTION IS UNOPPOSED. UPON CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, THE COURT CONFIRMS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONERS' UNOPPOSED MOTION TO "STAY THIS PROCEEDING IN ITS ENTIRETY" IS GRANTED.JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU) ***AFTER HEARING, AN ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stay
Off Calendar Jul-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):
David L. Rosenthal, Esq., CONSOVOY MCCARTHY PLLC, (703) 243-9423, for Petitioners.

No other appearances.

RE: Plaintiffs MANDY BLAKE, GRISELDA BLANCO, JASMIN BLEDSAW, DALE BLOCK, and MAX BOBRITSKY's Motion for Stay.

Matter is DISCUSSED. Counsel confirms in open court that the Motion is unopposed.

Upon conclusion of discussion, the court confirms its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioners' unopposed motion to "stay this proceeding in its entirety" is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)
